hero.title: A residential wellness and weight management program in nature
hero.body: At HK, accommodation, exercise, nutrition routine, social facilities, nature activities and follow-up are planned within the same campus. Complete the short pre-assessment to learn which program duration may suit you.

sections.internationalTitle: A residential camp experience in Turkey
sections.finalTitle: Learn the program duration that may suit you
sections.finalBody: Complete the short pre-assessment. Our team can inform you based on your goal, current situation and planned dates.

experience: Accommodation, daily rhythm and social facilities are part of the same center.
Exercise intensity is shaped around level, goal and program plan.
The stay supports a more structured routine during the program.
Nature, group energy and camp activities support the process.
audience: People who want to lose weight
People who struggle to build routine alone
People who want a controlled start
People building movement and nutrition habits
People seeking a social camp experience in nature
facility: A social facility area supporting movement, rest and recovery.
Spaces reserved for relaxation within the camp rhythm.
An indoor training environment for equipment-based and bodyweight work.
Shared spaces that make the camp feel broader than exercise alone.
Outdoor routes used for movement and motivation.
Quiet corners for recovery between program blocks.
activities: Individual work shaped by level and goal.
Movement blocks built around group energy and discipline.
A controlled exercise approach evaluated after pre-consultation for specific needs.
Outdoor movement around the campus environment.
A supportive option for lower-impact movement days.
Activities carrying social connection, enjoyment and structure.
dailyFlow: The day may start with a movement block adjusted to the plan.
Meals are placed within the program flow according to needs.
Indoor, outdoor or group sessions may be included during the day.
The pace balances recovery and social motivation.
The day may close with walks, conversation, activities or follow-up notes.
faq: Is the program the same for everyone?
No. The structure is evaluated according to consultation, goals, health status, stay duration and movement level.
How many days should I stay?
7, 14, 21 and 30-day options can be discussed. The suitable duration varies by person.
Can I join without a sports background?
Yes, starting level is reviewed during consultation and intensity is planned accordingly.
Can people with health issues join?
Special health situations are reviewed during pre-consultation and after necessary information is shared.
How does the daily flow work?
It includes movement, nutrition, rest and social activity blocks; the flow can vary by person and season.
What are the rooms like?
There are different room types. Availability and details are shared during consultation; room preference is not part of the quiz.
How does the process work for international guests?
Multilingual pre-information is provided; transport, accommodation and program details are clarified in consultation.
How is pricing determined?
Pricing depends on stay duration, room type, dates and program structure, and is shared during consultation.
What happens after the pre-assessment?
Our team reviews your information and calls you about a suitable program process.
Are results guaranteed?
No. Results vary according to health history, stay duration, adherence and lifestyle habits.

quiz.title: 60-second pre-assessment
quiz.intro: Answer a few questions. The HK team can contact you about program duration, camp process and details that may fit your needs.
quiz.resultBody: The HK team will contact you to share information about program duration, camp process and details according to your goal and current situation.
quiz.bmiNote: This information is only added to pre-consultation preparation.
quiz.consent: I have read the privacy and communication consent text and agree to be contacted.
